summary: GreenNet has real tests and a real manifest-driven evaluation pipeline, but final-submission reproducibility is weakened by conflicting canonical paths, a pinned historical bundle that is not the current rerun output, API behavior that depends on ambient SQLite state, a stale verification note, and an oversized 33G database artifact.

status_items.item: Automated tests exist across unit and integration layers
Tests fully validate the final official rerun path end-to-end
Reviewer-facing behavior is isolated from ambient machine state
One canonical command/path is consistently documented and implemented
Pinned historical results are clearly distinguished from current reproducible outputs
Artifact provenance is machine-readable and traceable

major_risks.title: Canonical path conflict
major_risks.detail: The reproduction code defaults to artifacts/final_pipeline/latest while the docs present artifacts/final_pipeline/official_acceptance_v1 as canonical. The latest path is explicitly historical and not the current rerun output.

major_risks.title: Ambient DB state affects reviewer-visible API output
major_risks.detail: api_app.py prefers the latest SQLite final_evaluation payload before scanning artifact files. This caused a current integration failure and makes behavior machine-state dependent.

major_risks.title: Verification note is stale
major_risks.detail: final_audit/verification/README.md claims a fully passing verification state that does not match the current observed integration test result.

major_risks.title: Oversized database artifact
major_risks.detail: artifacts/db/greennet.sqlite3 is about 33G, which is too large and too historically mixed for a clean reviewer-facing submission artifact.

major_risks.title: Historical and current final claims diverge
major_risks.detail: The pinned latest bundle reports 1.49% PPO energy reduction vs all_on, while the current runnable official bundle reports 1.33%.

executed_checks.details: pytest not found on PATH in this environment; repo-local .venv invocation worked

checklist.item: Unify the canonical rerun output path and the canonical shipped bundle
Fix /api/final_evaluation so it does not depend on ambient repository DB state when artifact-local state is intended
Refresh the verification note and supporting evidence
Reduce or exclude the 33G SQLite DB from the final reviewer package
Add one compact end-to-end reproducibility test that actually runs a minimized final pipeline
Normalize reviewer commands to repo-local .venv invocations
Mark archive-only evidence paths more aggressively
Curate artifacts/locked so it contains final evidence rather than mixed debugging history
